name: Annovis Bio, Inc.
summary: PART I . Our Company We are a late-stage clinical drug platform company addressing neurodegeneration, such as Alzheimers disease (AD) and Parkinsons disease (PD). We are developing our lead product candidate, buntanetap, which is designed to address AD, PD, and potentially other chronic neurodegenerative diseases. Buntanetap is a synthetically produced small molecule, orally administered, brain penetrant compound. In several studies, buntanetap was observed to inhibit the synthesis of neurotoxic...
